prompt_text:
### Demographics: 76-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 19 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs; Intermittent GI discomfort (nausea/bloating)

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Peripheral artery disease
MASH
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Alzheimer's Disease
Peptic ulcer disease (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Family history of type 2 diabetes not assessed
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 1-2 drinks/month

### Medication information
- Current medications: Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Duloxetine (60 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Donepezil (10 mg nightly), Memantine (10 mg twice daily), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 52.4 kg; Height 162.2 cm; BMI 19.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 114/66 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 8.4%; 6 months ago 7.9%; 3 months ago 7.4%; current 5.7%), FPG (12 months ago 247mg/dL; 9 months ago 208mg/dL; 6 months ago 214mg/dL; 3 months ago 197mg/dL; current 130mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 49.3kg; 9 months ago 49.1kg; 6 months ago 47.7kg; 3 months ago 44.1kg; current 52.4kg), Height (12 months ago 162.2cm; 9 months ago 162.2cm; 6 months ago 162.2cm; 3 months ago 162.2cm; current 162.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 19.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 18.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 17.0kg/m²; current 19.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 114mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 66mmHg; 9 months ago 66mmHg; 6 months ago 66mmHg; 3 months ago 66mmHg; current 66mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 78U/L; 9 months ago 73U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 63U/L; current 72U/L), AST (12 months ago 79U/L; 9 months ago 66U/L; 6 months ago 70U/L; 3 months ago 58U/L; current 72U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.3mg/dL; current 1.3mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 30mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 28mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; current 25mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 469mg/g; 9 months ago 471mg/g; 6 months ago 616mg/g; 3 months ago 599mg/g; current 503mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 88mg/dL; 9 months ago 91mg/dL; 6 months ago 89mg/dL; 3 months ago 85mg/dL; current 87mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 56mg/dL; 6 months ago 54mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 153mg/dL; 6 months ago 171mg/dL; 3 months ago 158mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.85 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Excellent adherence (estimated ≥90%); SMBG 4-5 times/week; diet/exercise well controlled.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
